checks.name: api
findings: No API endpoints found at common paths
No GraphQL endpoint found
CORS: open access (Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *)
Server always returns HTML regardless of Accept header — no API content negotiation

checks.name: auth
findings: Active bot blocking detected: Cloudflare, Cloudflare Challenge (active blocking)
CAPTCHA detected: recaptcha, hcaptcha, captcha
OAuth discovery found — supports client_credentials (machine-to-machine)
No login form found at common paths

checks.name: docs
findings: robots.txt is present and doesn't specifically block AI bots
robots.txt references a sitemap
sitemap.xml found with ~5454 URLs
No OpenAPI/Swagger specification found
Found 2 JSON-LD blocks: Corporation, WebSite
No llms.txt found (emerging standard for LLM-friendly docs)

checks.name: structure
findings: Heavy div usage: 680 divs with only 19 semantic elements
Poor accessibility: only 173/382 interactive elements have labels
Forms need work: 1/10 inputs have names, 10/10 have types
No stable test selectors found (data-testid, data-cy, etc.)
Very little content without JavaScript
Good heading hierarchy: 19 headings, well-structured
7 links with no text or aria-label — invisible to agents
Good link accessibility: 315/322 links are descriptive

checks.name: errors
findings: 404 returns HTML error page (not machine-readable)
No rate limit headers found
Returns 405 but missing Allow header

checks.name: cost
findings: Page is ~105,254 tokens raw — very expensive for agents (>15,000 threshold)
Signal-to-noise ratio is 5% — most of the page is noise
Inline scripts/styles are 0% of page — reasonable
Max DOM depth is 22 — moderately nested
CSS class attributes consume ~12,399 tokens (12% of page)
Reading this page costs $0.13–$1.58 per load ($0.66–$7.89 for a 5-page session)

checks.name: a11y
findings: Good landmark coverage: banner, contentinfo, main, navigation, region
8/85 images missing alt text — agents can't understand these images
No skip links found — agents must traverse entire page to find content
Found 2 live region(s) — agents can detect dynamic content changes
Found 2 elements with positive tabindex — may confuse agent tab navigation
4 custom elements made focusable via tabindex=0
8 elements with tabindex=-1 (programmatic focus)

checks.name: performance
findings: Fast response: 122ms
Moderate payload: 411KB
1 redirect(s) — acceptable
Lean resources: 8 scripts, 3 styles, 103 images
Compression enabled: gzip
